## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run test:all` green
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run format:check` clean
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `Unreleased` entry added
- [ ] Commits follow conventional commit format

## Scope check

Does this serve 0 to 1 (a new app running in minutes)? If it's a feature a generated app should own, it belongs there, not here.
